qa_pairs.question: What ship has the name HMS Destiny and was built in 1998?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT ship.ship_id FROM ship
WHERE ship.name = 'HMS Destiny' AND ship.built_year = 1998.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which ship entities with name equal to 'HMS Destiny' and built year equal to '1998.0'?
